name: Restore workflows and credentials from remote FTP backup storage

parameters.subject: =n8n SUCCESS: {{ $workflow.name }}
=n8n SUCCESS: {{ $workflow.name }}

nodes.name: ERROR: Find Most Recent Credentials Folder

parameters.command:
=# Remove the current workflow file from restore folder to prevent self-restoration
# Execute this AFTER writing files to disk but BEFORE import command

# Get current workflow name and clean it
WORKFLOW_NAME="{{ $workflow.name }}"
RESTORE_FOLDER="{{ $('Init').first().json.workflowConfig.PROJECT_ROOT_PATH }}/{{ $('Find Last Backup').item.json.latestBackupDate }}{{ $('Init').first().json.customConfig.workflows_temp_folder}}"

# Clean the workflow name (same logic as Clean Filename node)
CLEANED_NAME=$(echo "$WORKFLOW_NAME" | sed 's/[<>:"/\\|?*[:cntrl:]]/_/g' | sed 's/[[:space:].]\+/_/g' | sed 's/_\+/_/g' | sed 's/^_\+//;s/_\+$//')

echo "🔍 Current workflow: $WORKFLOW_NAME"
echo "🧹 Cleaned name: $CLEANED_NAME"
echo "📂 Restore folder: $RESTORE_FOLDER"

# Find and remove file matching the current workflow name
if [ -f "$RESTORE_FOLDER/${CLEANED_NAME}.json" ]; then
  rm "$RESTORE_FOLDER/${CLEANED_NAME}.json"
  echo "✅ Removed current workflow file: ${CLEANED_NAME}.json"
  echo "⚠️ This workflow will NOT be restored to prevent overwrite"
else
  echo "ℹ️ Current workflow file not found in restore folder (already safe)"
fi

# Count remaining files
FILE_COUNT=$(ls -1 "$RESTORE_FOLDER"/*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "📊 Remaining workflows to restore: $FILE_COUNT"

parameters.content:
## Start here
### ⚠ Warnings ⚠
• In case of full restore, restore Credentials first!
• Any already existing credential or workflow will be overwritten…

### Instructions
• Re-create your FTP credential (and optionnaly your SMTP one).
• Manually copy this workflow to your new n8n instance.
• Launch it and restore everything!

Can be used to move your workflows to another instance 👍🏻

### Configure the "Start Restore" JSON according to your need
```
[
  {
    "credentials": true,
    "worflows": false
  }
]
```
(and modify the "notes" too!).

### Configure the "Init" node
```
const FTP_BACKUP_FOLDER = $env.FTP_BACKUP_FOLDER || '/n8n-backups';
const credentials_temp_folder = '-restore-credentials';
const workflows_temp_folder = '-restore-workflows';
const FTPName = 'Your FTP Server Name';
const credentials = "n8n-credentials";
```

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash

# Create temporary restore folders based on trigger parameters
# This script creates folders only for selected restore options

# Get configuration from Init node
PROJECT_ROOT_PATH="{{ $('Init').first().json.workflowConfig.PROJECT_ROOT_PATH }}"
LOCAL_DATE="{{ $json.latestBackupDate }}"
CREDENTIALS_TEMP_FOLDER="{{ $('Init').first().json.customConfig.credentials_temp_folder }}"
WORKFLOWS_TEMP_FOLDER="{{ $('Init').first().json.customConfig.workflows_temp_folder }}"

# Get trigger parameters
RESTORE_CREDENTIALS="{{ $('Start Restore').first().json.credentials }}"
RESTORE_WORKFLOWS="{{ $('Start Restore').first().json.worflows }}"

echo "📋 Restore parameters:"
echo "   🔑 Credentials: $RESTORE_CREDENTIALS"
echo "   🔄 Workflows: $RESTORE_WORKFLOWS"
echo ""

FOLDERS_CREATED=0

# Create credentials temp folder if needed
if [ "$RESTORE_CREDENTIALS" = "true" ]; then
  CRED_PATH="${PROJECT_ROOT_PATH}/${LOCAL_DATE}${CREDENTIALS_TEMP_FOLDER}"
  mkdir -p "$CRED_PATH"
  echo "✅ Created credentials temp folder: $CRED_PATH"
  FOLDERS_CREATED=$((FOLDERS_CREATED + 1))
fi

# Create workflows temp folder if needed
if [ "$RESTORE_WORKFLOWS" = "true" ]; then
  WORK_PATH="${PROJECT_ROOT_PATH}/${LOCAL_DATE}${WORKFLOWS_TEMP_FOLDER}"
  mkdir -p "$WORK_PATH"
  echo "✅ Created workflows temp folder: $WORK_PATH"
  FOLDERS_CREATED=$((FOLDERS_CREATED + 1))
fi

echo ""
echo "📊 SUMMARY: $FOLDERS_CREATED folder(s) created"

if [ "$FOLDERS_CREATED" -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "⚠️  No folders created (no restore option selected)"
  exit 1
fi

main.node: ERROR: Find Most Recent Credentials Folder
